display.purpose: Hero text on auth screens and empty states. One instance per view maximum.

headline.purpose: Section headings, card titles, page header names.

title.purpose: Sidebar project names, table column headers, drawer section labels.

body.purpose: Descriptions, metadata, table content. Max 75ch line length in reading contexts.

label.purpose: Status pills, nav hints, breadcrumbs. Optional uppercase.

mono.purpose: All config keys, env var names, API tokens, JSON values. Never decorative.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Every focusable element. The only mandatory elevation signal.

shadows.name: focus-halo
shadows.purpose: Inputs and selects on focus; soft ring beyond the 2px outline.

shadows.name: brand-glow
shadows.purpose: Sidebar brand icon only. Identity marker, not structural.

shadows.name: button-shadow
shadows.purpose: Filled buttons at rest; collapses on active press.

motion.name: transition-base
motion.purpose: Component state transitions: color, opacity, focus ring.

motion.name: transition-slow
motion.purpose: Slide-in panels, sidebar toggle, stagger entrance.

motion.name: palette-in
motion.value: translateY(-10px) scale(0.97) → translateY(0) scale(1) over 0.15s ease-out

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.note: Sidebar switches from mobile drawer to fixed at lg.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single highest-priority action per view. Electric indigo background; appears alone, never competing with another indigo element.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; background: #6366f1; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.2s ease-out, transform 0.1s ease-out; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366f1; outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(99,102,241,0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary or cancel action. Pairs with Primary; never competes with it.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; background: #121214; color: #a1a1aa; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; border: 1px solid rgba(63,63,70,0.3); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease-out, color 0.15s ease-out, border-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #18181b; color: #f4f4f5; border-color: rgba(63,63,70,0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6366f1; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Confirm step inside a ConfirmDialog only. Never placed as a direct first action in a toolbar or form.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; background: #f87171; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.2s ease-out, transform 0.1s ease-out; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f87171; outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(248,113,113,0.2); } .ds-btn-destructive:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-destructive:disabled { opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Primary text field. Inset on the surface hierarchy via surface-lowest background.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #f4f4f5; } .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 14px; background: #030303; border: 1px solid rgba(63,63,70,0.3); border-radius: 12px; color: #f4f4f5; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(113,113,122,0.6); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary content container. Surface-low background, 16px radius. Flat at rest; no ambient shadow.
components.html:
backend-api

12 environment variables · Updated 2h ago
components.css: .ds-card { background: #121214; border: 1px solid rgba(63,63,70,0.15); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; color: #f4f4f5; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0 0 4px; color: #f4f4f5; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #a1a1aa; margin: 0; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation row. Active state uses surface-high background with indigo text and filled icon. No left-stripe border.
components.html: ProjectsTeam
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #a1a1aa; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease-out, color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #121214; color: #f4f4f5; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #27272a; color: #818cf8; } .ds-nav-icon { font-family: 'Material Icons'; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1; font-style: normal; } .ds-nav-label { white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill label for entity status. Four semantic variants, each with a tinted background at 15% opacity.
components.html: Active Error Warning Inactive
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.03em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--success { background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #10b981; } .ds-badge--error { background: rgba(248,113,113,0.15); color: #f87171; } .ds-badge--warning { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.15); color: #f59e0b; } .ds-badge--neutral { background: rgba(63,63,70,0.5); color: #a1a1aa; }

components.name: Config Key Row
components.description: A config entry row in the project table. Keys and values use JetBrains Mono to visually separate config identifiers from interface text.
components.css: .ds-config-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 10px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(63,63,70,0.15); transition: background 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-config-row:hover { background: #121214; } .ds-config-key { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #f4f4f5; min-width: 200px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-config-value { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #a1a1aa; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Skeleton Row
components.description: Loading placeholder for table rows. Zinc shimmer sweep, 1.5s period.
components.css: @keyframes ds-shimmer { 0% { background-position: -400px 0; } 100% { background-position: 400px 0; } } .ds-skeleton { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #27272a 25%, #3f3f46 50%, #27272a 75%); background-size: 800px 100%; animation: ds-shimmer 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-skeleton-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(63,63,70,0.15); }

narrative.overview:
A precise instrument carved from dark stone. The interface exists to serve a single purpose: giving non-technical administrators confident control over configuration without technical anxiety. Every surface is a tonal layer of near-black zinc, punctuated only by controlled bursts of electric indigo for active state and emerald for confirmation. The density is medium: enough breathing room for clarity, enough information on screen for efficiency.

The system explicitly rejects confusing developer-heavy dashboards with cryptic acronyms; generic SaaS templates with loud gradients, unnecessary animations, and low-contrast text; and interfaces that lack inline validation, explanations, or safety nets for configuration changes. It draws inspiration from Linear and Vercel's disciplined dark surfaces but adapts everything toward non-technical operators who need plain language, not code.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal depth without shadows: eight surface layers carry all hierarchical weight
Electric indigo as the single deliberate accent, used with strict economy
Two typefaces: Space Grotesk for headings, Inter for body
JetBrains Mono reserved exclusively for config values, keys, and identifiers
Motion is brief and directional (0.2-0.3s ease-out): no bounce, no elastic
Every interactive state declared: hover, focus, active, disabled, error

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Electric indigo is used on no more than one primary action per view. If two CTAs compete, the lower-priority one becomes outline or ghost. Indigo's authority comes from restraint.

rules.name: The Tonal Staircase Rule
rules.body: Depth is expressed through surface layer selection, not through box-shadow. Every new layer of elevation moves one step up the surface hierarchy. Cards use surface-low; panel overlays use surface; command palette uses surface-high.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards, panels, and list rows are flat at rest. A surface is elevated by its background color choice, not by a shadow. Shadows appear only when an element must assert its position above a sibling.

rules.name: The Two-Register Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk for headings; Inter for body. Never mix at the same hierarchical level. JetBrains Mono is reserved exclusively for config identifiers and code values.

rules.name: The Weight-Jump Rule
rules.body: Adjacent hierarchy levels must differ by at least one full weight step (400 to 600, or 600 to 700). Flat scales produce dead interfaces.

dos: Do use the eight-step surface hierarchy to express depth; choose a surface's background by its level in the stack.
Do reserve electric indigo for one primary action per view.
Do use JetBrains Mono for every configuration key, environment variable name, API token, and JSON value.
Do declare all four states on every interactive element: default, hover, focus, disabled.
Do place 2px solid indigo focus rings on every focusable element.
Do use ease-out curves at 0.2-0.3s for all transitions.
Do show skeleton shimmer states before data loads.
Do include a confirmation step for every destructive action.
Do translate configuration keys and technical fields into plain-language labels with helper hints.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right wider than 1px as a colored accent stripe on nav items, cards, or callouts.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Use a single solid color.
Don't use backdrop-filter: blur decoratively. Only on command palette backdrop and mobile overlay.
Don't build a hero metric layout (big number, small label, gradient accent).
Don't build a grid of identical cards. Vary affordance: list rows for dense data, cards for navigable entities.
Don't reach for a modal as the first response to a user action.
Don't use cryptic developer jargon in labels, headings, or validation messages.
Don't let placeholder text fall below outline/60 opacity.
Don't animate layout properties (width, height, margin, padding). Only transform and opacity.
Don't use #000000 or #ffffff. Darkest is #030303; lightest text is #f4f4f5.
Don't add glassmorphism to cards or content panels.
